# Transcrição: Bencivenga DVD1 - Intro

- **Fonte:** Bencivenga DVD1 - Intro
- **Duração:** 01:23
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:23]

Welcome to the Benavenga 100 seminar held at the Elegant St. Regis Hotel in New York City. This is where the legendary copywriter Gary Benavenga, after 40 years of scientific advertising tests, finally revealed all at once his most powerful secrets and strategies for boosting response, consistently beating control packages and space ads, amassing wealth from marketing breakthroughs, increasing your productivity and creativity, and manifesting your most passionately held desires for your life and career in marketing. The seminar attracted the best and brightest direct marketing talent from around the world, including superstar copywriters, world-famous entrepreneurs, top consultants, as well as an all-star array of highly respected marketing executives and other professionals from the world's most successful direct marketing firms. Given the talent in the room and the power of the strategies and secrets revealed, the seminar was hailed by industry leaders such as Brian Kurtz and Ken McCarthy as an historic event, fulfilling its billing as the greatest assembly of direct marketing talent ever gathered in one room. You will see the seminar uncut exactly as it unfolded, just as if you were there.
